lobby.text: The apartment block's lobby is thigh-deep in black water. The elevator shaft is open and flooded to the ceiling. A concrete stairwell to your right is dark but passable — the water only reaches the second step. Something floats face-down near the mailboxes and you make yourself not look at it.

choices.label: Climb the stairs to the upper floors.

upper_hall.text: The second floor is damp but above the flood line. Doors hang open on empty units, drawers pulled out and left. Someone else was here. You find a forgotten jacket hung on a hook and feel the pockets — a few fuel tabs and a foil pack of dried rations remain.

rooftop_cache.text: The roof is clear and dry. A waterproof survival bag is lashed to the exhaust stack — whoever left it here planned to return. Inside: sealed medicine, a full water container, and scrap metal stripped from the AC unit. The view from up here is bleak in every direction.

stair_collapse.text: The third step gives way. You catch yourself on the rail but your ankle twists hard against the broken concrete.

waterborne_sickness.text: You open a door and the backed-up sewage inside pours into the hallway. The smell alone makes you gag and you spend an hour leaning against the wall before you can continue.

hatch_fall.text: The hatch springs open and the pull-down ladder telescopes violently, catching you across the jaw and knocking you back down the stairs. You land hard and stay down for a moment.
